name: academorix/authorization
description: Attribute-driven controller authorization layer. Ships #[RequirePermission], #[RequireAnyPermission], #[RequireRole], #[RequireAnyRole], and #[AllowGuest] — enforced by a reflection-cached middleware that fails 401/403 BEFORE the controller body runs. Zero models, zero migrations, zero coupling to a specific permission backend — every domain package can require this without dragging spatie/laravel-permission's tables in. The heavier `packages/access` builds on top with roles + permissions + admin controllers.

suggest.academorix/database: Required by SeedsPermissionEnum — provides the underlying Enumable trait.
suggest.spatie/laravel-permission: Required by SeedsPermissionEnum — the permissions-table schema this trait writes to. Only needed by modules that project a PermissionEnum into the DB.
